title: La esquinita del bamboleo presents: The bois
description: This modpack was created by people who believe that minecraft needs a little extra without taking it to the limits of modding. We focus on performance while still creating a fun enviroment for players to play cooperatively.
body:
# The bois

Welcome to The bois. This modpack is something me and my friends created to play together using the Essential mod. We created this modpack mainly with optimization in mind, trying to be inclusive with all player. If you are a low end player you should be able to run this modpack. If you are a high end player, I have included some extra things like shader packs, which you can enable.

# For low end users

There are some mods which add a couple of client side features such as the shader packs. I recommend that if you are not using this, please remove the iris mod or disable it.

# Core mods

This pack focus around Create, Botania and world generation. It's very simple, with the idea to have a vanilla++ experience, focused around building cool contraptions.

# Discord server

Although this modpack won't have a full servicing system, feel free to join the modpack [discord](https://discord.gg/2FtzeCwJBM). Note: This server is a Spanish speaking server.
